title: Experienced Software Engineer - AI/ML (Computer Vision)
company_focus:
Aerospace manufacturing - commercial airplanes, defense
products, space systems
description:
Job Description At Boeing, we innovate and collaborate to
make the world a better place. We're committed to fostering
an environment for every teammate that's welcoming,
respectful and inclusive, with great opportunity for
professional growth. Find your future with us. Overview As a
leading global aerospace company, Boeing develops,
manufactures and services commercial airplanes, defense
products and space systems for customers in more than 150
countries. As a top U.S. exporter, the company leverages the
talents of a global supplier base to advance economic
opportunity, sustainability and community impact. Boeing's
team is committed to innovating for the future, leading with
sustainability, and cultivating a culture based on the
company's core values of safety, quality and integrity.
Technology for today and tomorrow The Boeing India
Engineering & Technology Center (BIETC) is a 5500+
engineering workforce that contributes to global aerospace
growth. Our engineers deliver cutting-edge R&D, innovation,
and high-quality engineering work in global markets, and
leverage new-age technologies such as AI/ML, IoT, Cloud,
Model-Based Engineering, and Additive Manufacturing, shaping
the future of aerospace. People-driven culture At Boeing, we
believe creativity and innovation thrives when every
employee is trusted, empowered, and has the flexibility to
choose, grow, learn, and explore. We offer variable
arrangements depending upon business and customer needs, and
professional pursuits that offer greater flexibility in the
way our people work. We also believe that collaboration,
frequent team engagements, and face-to-face meetings bring
together different perspectives and thoughts - enabling
every voice to be heard and every perspective to be
respected. No matter where or how our teammates work, we are
committed to positively shaping people's careers and being
thoughtful about employee wellbeing. With us, you can create
and contribute to what matters most in your career,
community, country, and world. Join us in powering the
progress of global aerospace. Position Overview: Boeing AI
India team has an immediate opening for an Experienced
Software Engineer - AI/ML (Computer Vision/Perception) to
join their team in Bangalore, KA. The selected individual
will develop next generation machine perception solutions
for aerospace applications. He/She/They will participate in
projects to support the development of engineering solutions
to improve aircraft performance, increase the operational
efficiency of aircraft fleet operators, improve/optimize the
productivity of Boeing operations and manufacturing,
simulate aircraft lifecycle scenarios for potential
customers. In addition, the candidate will support senior
members of the team in developing future vision and
direction of Boeing's AI development in the field of machine
perception, robotics, machine learning, image/video
processing, and their application to diverse areas relevant
to Boeing. Position Responsibilities:

- Development of innovative, nonstandard approaches for
  perception systems in support of manufacturing,
  maintenance and operations. Applications will span
  manufacturing automation, mobile devices, cabin features
  and flight-deck automation.
- Hands on coding and implementation, deep understanding of
  computer vision concepts.
- Own end-to-end development of perception pipelines for
  robotic and mobile platforms including, mobile robots,
  hand-held, and airborne.
- Implements GPU enabled solutions for indoor and outdoor
  localization, mapping, detection and segmentation. Using a
  variety of sensors including cameras, LiDAR, IMUs, and
  satellite navigation.
- Designs perception rigs and associated lifecycle software
  including calibration and health management. Designs for
  field application.
- Uses rapid-prototyping techniques to model and simulate
  perception systems including software and hardware in the
  loop testing.
- Collaborates with ML teams to produce scalable perception
  solutions suitable for the acquisition of large datasets
  while minimizing labeling needs.
- Working closely & collaboratively with an international team
  comprising software development and research engineers.
  Develop and maintaining relationships / partnerships with
  customers, stakeholders, peers, and partners to develop
  collaborative plans and execute on projects.
- Help in the adoption of new tools and technology, perform
  Proof-of-concepts and help engagements implement & take it
  over.
- Documenting results of research and development projects,
  and provide inputs for periodic updates to in the form of
  progress reports, project summaries, and other related
  documents. Tracking and evaluating performance to ensure
  product and process conformance to project plans and
  project requirements.

Basic Qualifications (Required Skills/Experience):

- Bachelor degree in Engineering, Engineering Technology
  (including Manufacturing Technology), Computer Science,
  Data Science, Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, or non-US
  equivalent qualifications directly related to the work
  statement.
- 8+ years of overall work experience with 6+ years in
  computer vision, perception, and mobile sensor platforms.
- Excellent presentation & communication skills: Demonstrate
  strong written, oral, presentation and interpersonal
  communication skills.

- Strong research background in innovating & developing
  technologies & solutions in machine perception with an
  experimental track record

Preferred Qualifications (Desired Skills/Experience):

- Masters / Ph.D. (desired) in Computer Science, Computer
  Engineering or related discipline from a reputed academic
  institution.
- Track record in performing research & development of highly
  innovative AI-driven solutions for difficult problems.
- Expertise in building and productizing perception solutions.
- Strong 3D computer vision fundamentals: calibration, multi-
  view geometry, photogrammetry.
- Experience with sensor fusion and state estimation,
  tracking, localization, multi-modal SLAM.
- Expertise in working with mobile robotics platforms.
- Experience with classical and ML-based computer vision
  techniques.
- Must have programming experience in Python, C++, ROS,
  OpenCV, Open3D, GTSAM.
- Cuda programming and embedded GPU development a plus.
- Research publications or contributions to open source
  perception stacks.
- ML experience with synthetic data generation / domain
  adaptation / self-supervised learning.
- Solid software engineering practices: unit/integration
  testing, CI/CD, version control, and traceability to
  requirements.
- Be a self-starter who is not afraid to pro-actively seek
  information and direction to successfully complete the
  statement of work.
- Be self-motivated and able to work independently with a
  positive attitude and highest ethics.
- Must be willing to work flexible hours (early or late as
  needed) to interface with Boeing personnel around the
  world.

Typical Education & Experience:

- Education/experience typically acquired through advanced
  education (e.g. Masters) and typically 8 Plus years'
  related work experience or PHD Degree with 6+ years of
  experience with an equivalent combination of education and
  experience.

Relocation:

- This position does offer relocation within INDIA.

Applications for this position will be accepted until Mar.
31, 2026 Export Control Requirements: This is not an Export
Control position. Education Bachelor's Degree or Equivalent
Required Relocation This position offers relocation based on
candidate eligibility. Visa Sponsorship Employer will not
sponsor applicants for employment visa status. Shift Shift 1
- Morning (India) Equal Opportunity Employer: We are an
equal opportunity employer. We do not accept unlawful
discrimination in our recruitment or employment practices on
any grounds including but not limited to; race, color,
ethnicity, religion, national origin, gender, sexual
orientation, gender identity, age, physical or mental
disability, genetic factors, military and veteran status, or
other characteristics covered by applicable law. We have
teams in more than 65 countries, and each person plays a
role in helping us become one of the world's most
innovative, diverse and inclusive companies. We are proud
members of the Valuable 500 and welcome applications from
candidates with disabilities. Applicants are encouraged to
share with our recruitment team any accommodations required
during the recruitment process. Accommodations may include
but are not limited to: conducting interviews in accessible
locations that accommodate mobility needs, encouraging
candidates to bring and use any existing assistive
technology such as screen readers and offering flexible
interview formats such as virtual or phone interviews.
responsibilities: Develop innovative perception systems for manufacturing, maintenance, and operations applications spanning automation, mobile devices, cabin features, and flight-deck automation
Own end-to-end development of perception pipelines for robotic and mobile platforms including mobile robots, hand-held, and airborne systems
Implement GPU-enabled solutions for indoor and outdoor localization, mapping, detection, and segmentation using cameras, LiDAR, IMUs, and satellite navigation
Design perception rigs and associated lifecycle software including calibration and health management for field applications
Use rapid-prototyping techniques to model and simulate perception systems with software and hardware in the loop testing
Collaborate with ML teams to produce scalable perception solutions suitable for large dataset acquisition while minimizing labeling needs
Work collaboratively with international teams of software development and research engineers
Help adopt new tools and technology, perform proof-of-concepts, and support implementation engagements
use_cases: Mobile robotics and airborne perception systems
Indoor and outdoor localization and mapping
Aircraft lifecycle simulation and performance improvement
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role focuses on developing computer vision and
perception systems using traditional ML/DL techniques
(calibration, sensor fusion, SLAM, 3D vision) for aerospace
applications. While it involves ML-based vision techniques,
it emphasizes classical computer vision and robotics
perception rather than LLMs, generative AI, or agent-based
systems.
